spec_match.rationale: The page probes Element.startViewTransition, Element.activeViewTransition, ViewTransition.transitionRoot, view-transition-name, view-transition-scope, and @view-transition while exercising scoped and fallback transition paths.

interactive.rationale: Real controls shuffle either scope, run both scopes in rapid succession, reset state, and log the chosen transition path plus returned ViewTransition details.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept still matches the feature-index promise of a two-panel compatibility lab with detection, concurrent scoped transitions, and element/document/instant fallback behavior.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported browsers get explicit feature-detection probes and a clean fallback path instead of throwing or rendering a blank page.

references.rationale: The see also section links directly to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5109852273377280.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles now use shared CSS variables only, and every local button background override pairs a color override.

summary: The major reference gap is fixed, the raw inline colors were replaced with shared tokens, and the lab now exposes the scoped transition/fallback behavior with a clearer live control surface.
